element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic damage output via holding fire button
Single powerful shot requiring meter management and timing
Defensive mechanic—shooting enemy projectiles to nullify them
Pattern recognition—identifying destructible weak points on each ST mech
Resource management of powerful consumable attacks
Each of 9 enemy STs has unique attack patterns requiring adaptive strategy

typical_relief_triggers: Successful weak point hit depletes enemy energy
Safe charging period while energy meter fills
typical_tension_triggers: Enemy weak point destruction phase requiring pattern adaptation
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Intense one-on-one duel rhythm with cyclical attack-defend phases; escalating difficulty across 9 sequential boss encounters

difficulty_curve.early_game: Low difficulty; introductory bosses teach basic attack patterns and mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Moderate increase; enemies develop more complex attack sequences and destructible weak points
difficulty_curve.late_game: Higher complexity; final bosses (leading to Anubis) require pattern mastery and resource management
notable_spikes: Progressive increase across 9 boss sequence (linear escalation rather than discrete spikes)
Anubis final boss encounter represents cumulative difficulty peak

notable_level_patterns.description: Game consists of 9 one-on-one ST mech battles presented sequentially. Each encounter is isolated arena duel with no stage navigation—player focuses entirely on learning enemy attack patterns and exploiting weak points.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: ST Garam battle (New York setting mentioned in source)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each enemy ST has distinct attack patterns and destructible weak points. Progression requires observing patterns, identifying vulnerabilities, and executing precise shots. Mastery involves both offensive damage and defensive interception.
10-minute time limit per stage creates tension window. Player must manage limited special items (bombs), energy meter charging, and ammo efficiency while learning enemy patterns.
